---
title: "Opening Chapter"
subtitle: "Using the UM6SS thesis template"
---

# Why this template matters

The Université Mohammed VI des Sciences et de la Santé uses a strong visual identity and a research-intensive academic structure. This template keeps the thesis format familiar, but removes the generic demo content so you can start from a document that already feels like UM6SS.

## What you customize first

- Replace `Your Name` and `Supervisor Name` in `_quarto.yml`.
- Update the department, faculty, and research unit to match your school.
- Swap the sample abstract with your actual thesis abstract.
- Keep the logo file in `images/logo.png` or replace it with the official campus or school mark.

## What the template already does

- Builds a thesis PDF with the UM6SS logo and title page.
- Keeps the front matter, declaration, acknowledgements, abbreviations, symbols, and appendices.
- Shares the same red accent color with the slides deck.

## Suggested thesis flow

1. State the clinical or scientific problem.
2. Explain the UM6SS context and your research gap.
3. Describe the methodology, ethics, and analysis plan.
4. Present results, discussion, and implications.

The next chapters provide a compact example of that structure.
